description:
Verify + standardize an address column via Precisely Address Verify.

Example:
    ```yaml
    type: dagster_community_components.PreciselyAddressVerifyComponent
    attributes:
      asset_name: verified_customer_addresses
      upstream_asset_key: customer_raw_addresses
      address_column: full_address
      country_column: country_code        # optional; defaults to USA
      output_prefix: av_
      client_id_env_var: PRECISELY_CLIENT_ID
      client_secret_env_var: PRECISELY_CLIENT_SECRET
    ```

upstream_asset_key.description: Upstream asset key providing a DataFrame with the address column.
upstream_asset_key.title: Upstream Asset Key

address_column.description: Source column with the single-line address string ('123 Main St, Springfield, MA 01103'). The API can also accept parsed components — see address_line_columns if you already have street/city/state split out.
address_column.title: Address Column

address_line_columns.description: Optional: pass parsed address parts instead of a single line. Map of {payload_field: source_column}, e.g. {addressLines: street, city: city, postalCode: zip}. When set, address_column is ignored.
address_line_columns.title: Address Line Columns

country_column.description: Optional column with ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code per row. Falls back to default_country when null/missing.
country_column.title: Country Column

default_country.description: Country code used when country_column is missing.
default_country.title: Default Country

output_prefix.description: Prefix for added columns (default 'av_': av_status, av_standardized, ...).
output_prefix.title: Output Prefix

client_id_env_var.description: Env var with Precisely OAuth2 client_id.
client_id_env_var.title: Client Id Env Var

client_secret_env_var.description: Env var with Precisely OAuth2 client_secret.
client_secret_env_var.title: Client Secret Env Var

batch_size.description: Addresses per request batch (Address Verify accepts batches).
batch_size.title: Batch Size

title: PreciselyAddressVerifyComponent
